entries.source: A clear front that asks one idea.
entries.value: एउटा विचार सोध्ने स्पष्ट अगाडिको भाग।

entries.source: A common trap that warns against a likely mistake.
entries.value: सम्भावित गल्तीबारे चेतावनी दिने सामान्य फन्दो।

entries.source: A concise back that completes the thought.
entries.value: विचार पूरा गर्ने संक्षिप्त पछाडिको भाग।

entries.source: A hint that helps without giving everything away.
entries.value: सबै कुरा नबताई मद्दत गर्ने सङ्केत।

entries.source: A review choice so missed cards return sooner.
entries.value: छुटेका card हरू छिटो फर्किने गरी review choice।

entries.source: A simple flashcard workflow
entries.value: सरल flashcard workflow

entries.source: A stronger card asks for recall:
entries.value: बलियो card ले recall माग्छ:

entries.source: A useful card asks one thing. It should not hide five questions inside one prompt. It should be specific enough to answer, but not so narrow that it becomes meaningless.
entries.value: उपयोगी card ले एउटा कुरा सोध्छ। यसले एउटै prompt भित्र पाँच प्रश्न लुकाउनु हुँदैन। उत्तर दिन मिल्ने गरी विशिष्ट हुनुपर्छ, तर अर्थहीन हुने गरी धेरै साँघुरो होइन।

entries.source: A weak AI flashcard says:
entries.value: कमजोर AI flashcard ले भन्छ:

entries.source: active recall
entries.value: सक्रिय पुनःस्मरण

entries.source: Add hints without giving away the answer
entries.value: उत्तर नदिई hints थप्नुहोस्

entries.source: AI can help make flashcards faster, but the learning still comes from retrieval. If the tool writes the cards and the learner never struggles to answer them, almost nothing has changed. The useful version turns messy notes into focused prompts, then makes the learner recall before revealing the answer.
entries.value: AI ले flashcard छिटो बनाउन मद्दत गर्न सक्छ, तर सिकाइ अझै retrieval बाटै आउँछ। tool ले card लेखिदिन्छ र learner ले उत्तर दिन संघर्ष गर्दैन भने खासै केही बदलिँदैन। उपयोगी version ले messy notes लाई focused prompts मा बदल्छ, त्यसपछि answer देखाउनु अघि learner बाट recall गराउँछ।

entries.source: AI can turn rough notes into cleaner retrieval prompts. It can split broad ideas into smaller cards, add examples, and identify traps a learner might miss.
entries.value: AI ले rough notes लाई सफा retrieval prompts मा बदल्न सक्छ। यसले broad idea लाई साना cards मा बाँड्न, examples थप्न र learner ले छुटाउन सक्ने traps पहिचान गर्न सक्छ।

entries.source: AI flashcards and active recall: how to remember more
entries.value: AI flashcards र active recall: अझ धेरै कसरी सम्झने

entries.source: apply a concept to a small example.
entries.value: एउटा concept लाई सानो example मा लागू गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Ask for one-idea cards with hints and common traps.
entries.value: hints र common traps सहित one-idea cards माग्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Back: "Spacing forces memory to reconstruct the answer after some forgetting, which strengthens later recall."
entries.value: पछाडिको भाग: "Spacing ले केही बिर्सिएपछि memory लाई answer फेरि reconstruct गर्न बाध्य पार्छ, जसले पछि recall बलियो बनाउँछ।"

entries.source: compare two ideas;
entries.value: दुई ideas compare गर्नुहोस्;

entries.source: define a term;
entries.value: term define गर्नुहोस्;

entries.source: Delete cards that are too broad or obvious.
entries.value: धेरै broad वा obvious cards delete गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Do not review everything equally
entries.value: सबै कुरा बराबरी review नगर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Easy. Push it later.
entries.value: सजिलो। पछि push गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: explain a cause;
entries.value: cause explain गर्नुहोस्;

entries.source: Flashcards are one of the simplest ways to do this.
entries.value: Flashcards यो गर्ने सबैभन्दा सरल तरिकामध्ये एक हुन्।

entries.source: Flashcards are powerful, but they are not the whole study process. They are best for retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, and key examples. They are weaker when the learner has never understood the idea in the first place.
entries.value: Flashcards शक्तिशाली हुन्छन्, तर ती पूरा study process होइनन्। ती retrieval, vocabulary, definitions, formulas, distinctions, र key examples का लागि best हुन्छन्। learner ले idea पहिले कहिल्यै बुझेको छैन भने ती कमजोर हुन्छन्।

entries.source: Flashcards work best when they test one idea at a time, reveal answers only after effort, and review missed cards sooner.
entries.value: Flashcards ले एक पटकमा एउटा idea test गर्दा, effort पछि मात्र answers reveal गर्दा, र missed cards चाँडै review गर्दा सबैभन्दा राम्रो काम गर्छन्।

entries.source: For a deeper route, read the Flashcard Builder guide and the Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop. The goal is not a beautiful deck. The goal is remembering more when the notes are gone.
entries.value: deeper route का लागि Flashcard Builder guide र Flashcard Builder prompts and study loop पढ्नुहोस्। लक्ष्य सुन्दर deck होइन। लक्ष्य notes हटेपछि अझ धेरै सम्झनु हो।

entries.source: For example:
entries.value: उदाहरणका लागि:

entries.source: Front: "Why does spaced review work better than cramming?"
entries.value: Front: "spaced review cramming भन्दा किन राम्रो काम गर्छ?"

entries.source: Hard. Review after a short delay.
entries.value: कठिन। छोटो delay पछि review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Hint: "Think about forgetting and retrieval."
entries.value: Hint: "forgetting र retrieval बारे सोच्नुहोस्।"

entries.source: Hints are useful when they preserve effort. A bad hint is the answer in disguise. A good hint narrows the search space.
entries.value: Hints effort जोगाउँदा उपयोगी हुन्छन्। bad hint answer को disguise हो। good hint ले search space साँघुरो बनाउँछ।

entries.source: identify a common mistake;
entries.value: common mistake identify गर्नुहोस्;

entries.source: If a card keeps failing, do not only repeat it. Ask why it is hard. Use Socratic Instruction to uncover the misconception, Math Step Coach for procedural gaps, or the AI learning prompt library to find a better study prompt.
entries.value: card fail भइरह्यो भने केवल repeat नगर्नुहोस्। किन कठिन छ सोध्नुहोस्। misconception uncover गर्न Socratic Instruction, procedural gaps का लागि Math Step Coach, वा राम्रो study prompt खोज्न AI learning prompt library प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed around that active recall loop: build a deck, try the front, reveal the answer, rate your recall, and review the misses until the idea sticks.
entries.value: inspir को Flashcard Builder त्यो active recall loop वरिपरि designed छ: deck build गर्नुहोस्, front try गर्नुहोस्, answer reveal गर्नुहोस्, recall rate गर्नुहोस्, र idea stick नभएसम्म misses review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Missed. Review soon.
entries.value: छुट्यो। चाँडै review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: One mistake learners make is treating every card the same. If you know a card instantly, reviewing it again tomorrow may waste time. If you miss a card, waiting a week may be too long.
entries.value: learners ले गर्ने एउटा mistake हरेक card लाई उस्तै treat गर्नु हो। card तुरुन्तै थाहा छ भने भोलि फेरि review गर्नु time waste हुन सक्छ। card miss भयो भने एक हप्ता पर्खनु धेरै लामो हुन सक्छ।

entries.source: Pair flashcards with understanding
entries.value: flashcards लाई understanding सँग pair गर्नुहोस्

entries.source: Paste a small chunk of notes into Flashcard Builder.
entries.value: Flashcard Builder मा notes को सानो chunk paste गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Photosynthesis: the process plants use to make food.
entries.value: Photosynthesis: plants ले food बनाउन प्रयोग गर्ने process।

entries.source: Rate recall honestly.
entries.value: recall इमानदारीपूर्वक rate गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Reading notes feels productive. Remembering them later is the real test.
entries.value: Reading notes productive महसुस हुन्छ। पछि तिनलाई सम्झनु real test हो।

entries.source: remember a sequence;
entries.value: sequence सम्झनुहोस्;

entries.source: Review without looking at the back.
entries.value: back नहेरी review गर्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: strong cards मा प्रायः समावेश हुन्छ:

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: अध्ययन सीपहरू

entries.source: That hint helps the learner start without removing the act of remembering. inspir's Flashcard Builder is designed for this reveal-and-rate loop: try first, reveal second, rate honestly, then bring weak cards back sooner.
entries.value: त्यो hint ले remembering को act नहटाई learner लाई start गर्न मद्दत गर्छ। inspir को Flashcard Builder यस reveal-and-rate loop का लागि designed छ: पहिले try, दोस्रो reveal, honestly rate, अनि weak cards sooner फर्काउनुहोस्।

entries.source: That is why active recall matters. Instead of looking at the answer, you try to pull it from memory. The effort strengthens the memory and reveals what still needs work.
entries.value: त्यसैले active recall महत्त्वपूर्ण छ। answer हेर्नुको सट्टा तपाईं memory बाट pull गर्ने प्रयास गर्नुहुन्छ। effort ले memory strengthen गर्छ र अझै work चाहिने कुरा reveal गर्छ।

entries.source: The learner still has to do the remembering. That is the point.
entries.value: learner ले अझै remembering गर्नुपर्छ। point त्यही हो।

entries.source: The second card makes the learner retrieve a relationship, not simply recognize a sentence. Good cards usually focus on one of these jobs:
entries.value: second card ले learner लाई sentence simply recognize गर्न नभई relationship retrieve गर्न लगाउँछ। Good cards प्रायः यी jobs मध्ये एउटामा focus गर्छन्:

entries.source: This does not need to be complicated. The important part is that your review schedule responds to memory instead of treating the deck like a static list.
entries.value: यो complicated हुनु आवश्यक छैन। important part भनेको review schedule ले deck लाई static list जस्तो treat नगरी memory लाई respond गर्नु हो।

entries.source: Try it in Flashcard Builder. If you need to understand the topic before making cards, start in Learn Anything. If you want pressure after reviewing cards, move into Quiz Me On Trivia or Viva Practice.
entries.value: यसलाई Flashcard Builder मा प्रयास गर्नुहोस्। कार्ड बनाउनुअघि विषय बुझ्नुपर्छ भने Learn Anything बाट सुरु गर्नुहोस्। कार्ड समीक्षा गरेपछि दबाब चाहनुहुन्छ भने Quiz Me On Trivia वा Viva Practice मा जानुहोस्।

entries.source: Turn notes into better cards
entries.value: notes लाई अझ राम्रो card मा बदल्नुहोस्

entries.source: Turn repeated misses into a question for Learn Anything.
entries.value: बारम्बार छुटेका कुरालाई Learn Anything का लागि प्रश्नमा बदल्नुहोस्।

entries.source: Use this loop:
entries.value: यो loop प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: Use three ratings:
entries.value: तीन ratings प्रयोग गर्नुहोस्:

entries.source: What is the role of chlorophyll in photosynthesis?
entries.value: photosynthesis मा chlorophyll को भूमिका के हो?

entries.source: What makes a good flashcard
entries.value: राम्रो flashcard के ले बनाउँछ

entries.source: When you paste notes into AI, ask it to split broad ideas into those jobs. A deck with 18 specific cards is usually better than a deck with 5 giant cards that each contain a whole paragraph.
entries.value: तपाईंले AI मा notes paste गर्दा, broad ideas लाई ती jobs मा split गर्न भन्नुहोस्। प्रत्येकमा पूरा paragraph भएको 5 giant cards भएको deck भन्दा 18 specific cards भएको deck सामान्यतया राम्रो हुन्छ।

entries.source: Where AI helps
entries.value: AI ले मद्दत गर्ने ठाउँ
